title: Smoky Duck Bliss
description: A vegan-friendly Venezuelan dish featuring blended duck fat for a smoky flavor and gooey texture, perfect as a hangover cure.

ingredients.name: Duck Fat (substituted with vegetable shortening or coconut oil for vegan version)
ingredients.notes: Can also use 1 can of blended duck fat from past roasting as a traditional option

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add onions and garlic, sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in diced mushrooms, cook for another 5 minutes until they release their moisture.
Fold in chopped tomatoes, salt, and pepper. Simmer gently for about 10 minutes to meld flavors.
If using traditional duck fat, add a ladle of the simmering mixture (about 2 tablespoons) to the skillet with the vegetables, stirring well to coat everything evenly.
Add the drained Garbanzo beans, mix well and cook for another few minutes until heated through. The consistency can be adjusted by adding more liquid if needed.
Taste and adjust seasoning as necessary.
